docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVIN ZIMEL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID J. DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUL-18-1994, OVERRULED FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID J.
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVIN ZIMEL INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED. COURT RULES FOR PLAINTIFF, LEVIN ZIMEL INC. PLAINTIFF, LEVIN ZIMEL INC. IS TO RECEIVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 285 TURK STREET, #202 SAN FRANCISCO. RENT AND DAMAGES OF $2,250.00 ARE ALSO AWARDED. THE LEASE, IN THIS CASE, IS FORFEITED. CLERK IS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 285 TURK #202, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $2,250.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.00, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID J.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID J.
